positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical mandalic design featuring interwoven bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebula swirls. The composition is centered and highly detailed, suitable for a large apparel print. Dominant colors are deep midnight blues, vibrant sapphire accents, glowing ethereal lavender, and touches of brilliant gold leaf detailing. The style must be a sophisticated blend of psychedelic geometry and Art Nouveau elegance. Use high contrast for crisp separation between the glowing elements and the dark background. Include clean, strong silhouettes of stylized crescent moons, blooming cosmic lotus flowers, and gentle swirling constellations. Vector art quality, detailed linework, ultra-high resolution, seamless pattern potential.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, dirty, grayscale, monochrome, cartoon, realistic photo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, clumpy, negative space too harsh
